paper_title: An improved automated diatom detection method based on YOLOv5 framework and its preliminary study for taxonomy recognition in the forensic diatom test

methods.description: Collection and preparation of diatom samples from various sources for evaluation of diatom detection and genus recognition models.

steps.description: Collect samples of five lab-grown diatom genera: Coscinodiscus, Cymbella, Navicula, Nitzschia, and Synedra.
inputs: Institute of Hydrobiology, Chinese Academy of Sciences

steps.description: Collect samples from lung, liver, and kidney tissues from drowning cases.
steps.searchable_summary: collect tissue samples from drowning cases

steps.description: Process samples using Microwave Digestion-Vacuum Filtration-Automated Scanning Electron Microscopy.
Acquire SEM images using Phenom XL desktop SEM at 1,500× magnification.
Label positions and genera of diatoms in SEM images by forensic pathologists.
steps.searchable_summary: label diatom positions and genera in SEM images

methods.description: Evaluation of diatom detection and recognition models using lab-grown diatom samples.

steps.description: Apply 4-fold cross-validation on images to evaluate single-class detection and multi-class recognition.
Initialize models with pre-trained parameters from ImageNet before training.
steps.searchable_summary: initialize models with ImageNet pre-trained parameters

steps.description: Evaluate model performance using precision, recall, and AP@0.5 scores.
steps.searchable_summary: evaluate model performance with precision, recall, AP@0.5

steps.description: Plot precision-recall curves and confusion matrices to analyze model performance.
steps.searchable_summary: plot precision-recall curves and confusion matrices

methods.description: Performance evaluation of diatom detection models on lung tissue samples from drowning cases.

steps.description: Split SEM images of lung samples into four groups for cross-validation.
steps.searchable_summary: split lung SEM images for cross-validation

steps.description: Initialize models with pre-trained YOLOv5m model on lab-grown diatom samples.
steps.searchable_summary: initialize models with YOLOv5m pre-trained on lab-grown samples

steps.description: Evaluate model performance using precision-recall curves and AP@0.5 scores.

steps.description: Illustrate detection cases with confidence scores on test images.
